allow: PowerShell(Get-Command python, python3, node, npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell($nodeDir = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs"; if \(Test-Path $nodeDir\) { $env:PATH = "$nodeDir;$env:PATH"; node --version; npm --version } else { "Node.js not found in standard location" })
